description: Tasks template for Java upgrade to latest LTS versions

tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21, update build configuration (pom.xml or build.gradle), migrate deprecated APIs, and ensure compatibility with Java 21 features
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21. Updated pom.xml compiler settings, modernized deprecated API usages (isEmpty, String.formatted, getFirst). Build and unit tests passed.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4 (latest stable)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot to 3.4.x, Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate from javax.* to jakarta.* packages, update dependency versions, and address breaking changes in Spring Boot 3
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5 via intermediate step 3.3.13. Migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces using OpenRewrite recipe. Build and unit tests passed.

tasks.description: Upgrade project dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all third-party dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4, resolve any dependency conflicts, and ensure all libraries support Jakarta EE namespace
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.18.0 fixing CVE-2024-47554. H2 database CVE resolved by Spring Boot 3.4.5 BOM. Build and unit tests passed. No remaining High/Critical CVEs.
